fields.description:
Document the remediation re-review and prove it offline. Add a `docs/plan-review-gate.md`
section AND an ADR under `docs/adr/` (recording the chosen design, the three rejected
alternatives, and the invariants: Pass-1 unanchored; novelty in a SEPARATE Pass-2 sub-call;
drop decision deterministic in Pass-3). Add FakeRunner tests covering convergence on a
remediation edit (novel low-priority dropped, carryover enforced, novel high-priority
preserved) plus every precondition fallback to a byte-identical full review (code drift,
window expiry, registry skew, no/old sidecar, config off).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/plan-review-gate.md` section on the rising-floor remediation re-review
- [ ] An ADR under `docs/adr/` records the design, 3 rejected alternatives, and the invariants
- [ ] FakeRunner test: convergence on a remediation edit in `tests/unit/`
- [ ] FakeRunner tests: each precondition fallback -> byte-identical full review
- [ ] Test: novel high-priority preserved; carryover still enforced at the normal bar
